metadata.instruction: Set DuckDuckGo as the default search engine on Chrome
metadata.context: I prefer a privacy-focused search engine and want to use DuckDuckGo by default.

l3.rationale: Win likely switched away from VS Code toward Chrome.

l4.rationale: Switched to Chrome, dismissed the restore prompt, then opened the Chrome menu and chose Settings to get into the browser settings workflow.

l5.rationale: The actions mainly use browser menus and window switching to reach Chrome's settings area, which is the prerequisite for changing the default search engine.

actions.window_title: Settings - Manage search engines and site search - Google Chrome

element_under_cursor.name: Click to open Edit dialog for DuckDuckGo More actions for DuckDuckGo

l3.rationale: Enter opens the More actions button menu.

l4.rationale: Opened DuckDuckGo's actions menu and selected Make default to change the browser setting so DuckDuckGo becomes the default search engine.

l5.rationale: The final actions open a selection control and choose the desired menu item, completing the change of the default search engine to DuckDuckGo.

l5.rationale: The final actions open a selection control and choose the desired menu item, completing the change of the default search engine to DuckDuckGo.

l5.rationale: The final actions open a selection control and choose the desired menu item, completing the change of the default search engine to DuckDuckGo.
